title: Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas, Desai & Diwanji act on Dhoot Transmission - Israel's RideVision collaboration
description: Dhoot Automotive Systems Private Limited has entered into a collaboration with Ride Vision Limited, an Israel-based company specializing in Advanced Rider Assistance Systems (ADAS) and AI-powered collision avoidance technologies.Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co advised Dhoot Automotive Systems on this collaboration.The transaction team was led by Jamshed Bhumgara (Partner) and Namrata Bhagwatula (Partner), with support from Aparna R. (Senior Associate) and Mannat Mahey (Associate). The team
